# doit_cloud_diagrams_export (Data Source)

Exports the full content of a Cloud Diagram layer as a structured document with anonymized component IDs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Use case: Export a specific project's diagram and inspect its topology.

# Step 1: Search for the diagram by project name.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_search" "project" {
  query = "my-gcp-project"
}

locals {
  # Pick the first matching layer.
  layer_id = data.doit_cloud_diagrams_search.project.scheme[0].ss_id
}

# Step 2: Export the layer (component IDs are anonymized for portability).
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_export" "layer" {
  id = local.layer_id
}

# Summarize the exported topology.
output "topology" {
  value = {
    nodes  = length(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_export.layer.nodes)
    groups = length(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_export.layer.groups)
    links  = length(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_export.layer.links)
  }
}

# List link connections with their origin and destination.
output "connections" {
  value = [
    for l in data.doit_cloud_diagrams_export.layer.links : {
      origin      = l.origin._id
      destination = l.destination._id
      type        = l.connection_type
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Layer ID.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `attachments` (Attributes List) Exported attachments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attachments))
- `combiners` (Attributes List) Exported combiners. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--combiners))
- `elements` (Attributes List) Exported elements. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements))
- `groups` (Attributes List) Exported groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `links` (Attributes List) Exported links. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--links))
- `metadata` (Attributes) Metadata included in a diagram JSON export. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `nodes` (Attributes List) Exported nodes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))
- `notes` (Attributes List) Exported notes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notes))
- `statussheet` (String) Diagram-level metadata (excluding internal IDs). Value is JSON-encoded.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--attachments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attachments`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Attachment ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Attachment color.
- `group` (String) Parent group ID.
- `icon` (String) Attachment icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this attachment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attachments--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--attachments--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attachments.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.



<a id="nestedatt--combiners"></a>
### Nested Schema for `combiners`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Combiner ID.
- `color` (String) Combiner color.
- `icon` (String) Combiner icon identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Components contained in the combiner. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--combiners--items))
- `name` (String) Combiner name.

<a id="nestedatt--combiners--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `combiners.items`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.



<a id="nestedatt--elements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elements`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Element ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Element color.
- `icon` (String) Element icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this element. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent element ID.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--elements--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elements.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.

### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Group ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Group color.
- `group_type` (String) Group type.
- `icon` (String) Group icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups--issues))
- `items` (Attributes List) Components contained in the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups--items))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

### Nested Schema for `groups.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.


<a id="nestedatt--groups--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups.items`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.



<a id="nestedatt--links"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Link ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `connection_type` (String) Link connection type.
- `destination` (Attributes) Reference to a diagram component, including its parent diagram and layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--links--destination))
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this link. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--links--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `origin` (Attributes) Reference to a diagram component, including its parent diagram and layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--links--origin))
- `owner_ss_id` (String) Owner layer ID for cross-diagram links.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--links--destination"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links.destination`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.


<a id="nestedatt--links--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.


<a id="nestedatt--links--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links.origin`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.



<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Read-Only:

- `connections` (Map of String) Map of component ID to display label for external connections referenced by cross-diagram links.
- `date` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of the export.
- `user` (String) Email of the user who triggered the export.
- `version` (String) Export format version.


<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Node ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Node color.
- `icon` (String) Node icon identifier.
- `infra_node` (Attributes) Reference to a linked infrastructure node in another diagram. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--infra_node))
- `instance_count` (Number) Number of instances represented by this node.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent node ID.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `running` (Boolean) Whether the node is currently running.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--infra_node"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.infra_node`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Infrastructure node ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.


<a id="nestedatt--nodes--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.



<a id="nestedatt--notes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notes`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Note ID.
- `color` (String) Note background color.
- `font_size` (Number) Note font size.
- `text` (String) Note text content.
